title: Immunization Education & Training | Vaccine Trainings | CDC
text:
ucation series discusses vaccination principles, best practices, and disease-specific information. 
Immunization Training Online Courses 
CDC offers continuing education for several self-study programs on immunization. 
Speaker requests 
CDC offers dynamic speakers to cover a wide range of immunization topics at meetings, conferences, grand rounds, and other events.
Communication resources 
CDC has a number of communication resources to help health care providers educate themselves, their staff, or their patients about vaccinations.
Access Vaccine Communication Resources for Health Care Providers .
